provenance.basis: periodic cubic B-spline longitudinal geometry; legacy uniform theta collocation
provenance.represented_modes: legacy closed case declares mpol=1 with ntheta=6
provenance.stale_reason: all shaped states predate axis regularity and input/2; mpol=1 with ntheta=6 cannot be reproduced by the current exact-mpol collocation

periodic_preconditioner_attempt.case: 892-variable finite-current rotating-ellipse racetrack at 16 periodic coefficients
periodic_preconditioner_attempt.decision: periodic tensor block is dimensionally correct but fails the linear-residual and Krylov-growth gates; retain it for adjoint research, keep closed primal solves below the dense threshold

closed_circular_torus.initializer: axial average of sqrt(g)/g_xixi; circular limit gives B proportional to 1/R
closed_circular_torus.status: complete radius-plus-stream-function equilibrium; discrete and weak residuals pass, while pointwise force still requires radial refinement

assessment: The periodic geometry and dense bounded solve are retained research evidence. Pointwise force, scalable preconditioning, circular VMEC parity, and open-leg convergence remain promotion gates.
